MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS INC COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC. RECONTRUST COMPANY HEARING SET FOR DEC-15-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
REPLY IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO STRIKE FILED BY DEFENDANT COUNTRIWIDE HOME LOANS INC RECONSTRUCT COMPANY MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS INC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS INC, COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC., RECONTRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT DEFECTS CAN BE CURED BY AMENDMENT. THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (QUIET TITLE) FAILS BECAUSE MERS AND RECONTRUST DID HAVE AUTHORITY TO FORECLOSE. TO THE EXTENT THIS DISPUTE OVER TITLE IS BASED ON THE WRONGFUL FORECLOSURE CLAIM, PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE TENDER. THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (WRONGFUL FORECLOSURE) DOES NOT EXIST AND TENDER IS NOT SUFFICIENTLY PLED. THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUDULENT MISREPRESENTATION) LACKS A LEGALLY RECOGNIZED DUTY AND JUSTIFIABLE RELIANCE. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGE HOW THE SELLING OF THE LOAN HARMED HER, HOW SHE RELIED ON THAT, OR WHY DEFENDANTS HAD A DUTY TO DISCLOSE. GENERALLY, THERE IS NO DUTY BETWEEN A BANK AND A BORROWER. THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION (IMPLIED COVENANT) FAILS BECAUSE AN IMPLIED COVENANT CANNOT IMPOSE SUBSTANTIVE DUTIES BEYOND THOSE INCORPORATED INTO THE TERMS OF THE PARTIES' CONTRACT. THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION (B&P CODE 17200) IS PREDICATED ON CONDUCT THAT IS NOT ACTIONABLE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS INC, COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC, AND RECONTRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (QUIET TITLE) ALLEGES THAT MERS AND RECONTRUST DID NOT HAVE AUTHORITY TO FORECLOSE WHICH IS CONTRADICTED BY THE PROPERLY JUDICIALLY NOTICED DEED OF TRUST. THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (WRONGFUL FORECLOSURE) MUST ALLEGE AN ABILITY AND WILLINGNESS TO TENDER FULL PAYMENT. (ABDULLAH VS. U.S. BANK (1996) 43 CAL.APP. 4TH 1101.) AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUDULENT MISREPRESENTATION) PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD A LEGALLY RECOGNIZED DUTY AND JUSTIFIABLE RELIANCE. PLAINTIFF MUST OVERCOME THE GENERAL RULE THAT THERE IS NOT DUTY BETWEEN A LENDING INSTITUTION AND A BORROWER. (NYMARK VS. HEART FED. & LOAN ASSOC. SAV. (1991) 231 CAL.APP. 3RD 1089.) AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION (IMPLIED COVENANT) PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD SUBSTANTIVE DUTIES THAT ARE NOT BEYOND THOSE INCORPORATED INTO THE TERMS OF THE PARTIES CONTRACT. (AGOSTA VS. ASTOR (2004) 120 CAL.APP. 4TH 596.) THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION (B&P SEC. 17200) IS PREDICATED ON THE FRAUD CLAIM WHICH FAILS FOR LACK OF SPECIFICITY, AND FOR FAILURE TO PLEAD A DUTY OR JUSTIFIABLE RELIANCE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797

MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS INC, COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC., RECONTRUST COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: off calendar as moot in view of the court's ruling on demurrer. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS INC, COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC., RECONTRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained without leave to amend, no reasonable probability that defects can be cured by amendment. The 1st cause of action (quiet title) fails because MERS and Recontrust did have authority to foreclose. To the extent this dispute over title is based on the wrongful foreclosure claim, plaintiff fails to allege tender. The 2nd cause of action (wrongful foreclosure) does not exist and tender is not sufficiently pled. The 3rd cause of action (fraudulent misrepresentation) lacks a legally recognized duty and justifiable reliance. Plaintiff does not sufficiently allege how the selling of the loan harmed her, how she relied on that, or why defendants had a duty to disclose. Generally, there is no duty between a bank and a borrower. The 4th cause of action (implied covenant) fails because an implied covenant cannot impose substantive duties beyond those incorporated into the terms of the parties' contract. The 5th cause of action (B&P Code 17200) is predicated on conduct that is not actionable. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS INC, COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC, AND RECONTRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT

No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend. The 1st cause of action (quiet title) alleges that MERS and Recontrust did not have authority to foreclose which is contradicted by the properly judicially noticed deed of trust. The 2nd cause of action (wrongful foreclosure) must allege an ability and willingness to tender full payment. (Abdullah vs. U.S. Bank (1996) 43 Cal.App. 4th 1101.) As to the 3rd cause of action (fraudulent misrepresentation) plaintiff must plead a legally recognized duty and justifiable reliance. Plaintiff must overcome the general rule that there is not duty between a lending institution and a borrower. (Nymark vs. Heart Fed. & Loan Assoc. Sav. (1991) 231 Cal.App. 3rd 1089.) As to the 4th cause of action (implied covenant) plaintiff must plead substantive duties that are not beyond those incorporated into the terms of the parties contract. (Agosta vs. Astor (2004) 120 Cal.App. 4th 596.) The 5th cause of action (B&P sec. 17200) is predicated on the fraud claim which fails for lack of specificity, and for failure to plead a duty or justifiable reliance. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR #5797

MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS INC, COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC, AND RECONTRUST COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, TREBLE DAMAGES AND ATTORNEY'S FEES. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted with 10 days leave to amend. Punitive damages must be pled with specificity. B&P sec. 17200 action is equitable in nature and damages cannot be recovered. Plaintiff must allege valid claim for treble damages and attorney fees. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR #5797
